summary: Iteration 77: Sprint 2 Intelligence Depth Verification. All 3 deliverables verified via code structure review: (1) query-integrations-data Edge Function exists with correct structure, (2) FloatingSoundboard with data query routing + BNA update flow, (3) VerificationBadge in DashboardLayout header. Level 3 Cognition changes confirmed: drift_velocity, trajectory_projection_90_days, data_gaps, snapshot_confidence. insight_outcomes SQL migration complete with proper schema. biqc-insights-cognitive stores predictions. Frontend compiles successfully.

critical_code_review_comments: All Sprint 2 deliverables are code-complete and properly structured
Edge Functions are SOURCE CODE ONLY - deployed to Supabase separately (not callable in preview)
DATA_KEYWORDS list in FloatingSoundboard could be extracted to constants file for reuse
BNA_PATTERNS regex patterns handle common natural language update formats well
insight_outcomes table uses proper referential integrity with snapshot_id foreign key
Prediction instrumentation is Phase 1 (storage only) - no automated evaluation yet

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 complete. Sprint 2 Intelligence Depth fully verified via code review. Three main deliverables: (1) query-integrations-data Edge Function for Soundboard data queries, (2) Enhanced FloatingSoundboard with BNA update flow, (3) VerificationBadge in header. Level 3 Cognition changes: drift_velocity, trajectory_projection_90_days, data_gaps, snapshot_confidence. insight_outcomes SQL migration for prediction tracking. All Edge Functions are source code only - deployed to Supabase separately.
